---
id: outgoing-webhook-delete
title: "Delete an outgoing webhook of an app"
description: "Delete an existing outgoing webhook for a specified Bitrise app."
sidebar_label: "Delete an outgoing webhook of an app"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete an outgoing webhook of an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/outgoing-webhooks/{app-webhook-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete an existing outgoing webhook for a specified Bitrise app.

  as={"h2"}
